name: Brandenburger Schraubenwerk MCP
description: WebMCP server for the Brandenburger Schraubenwerk catalogue. Exposes a single tool, create_offer, that produces a binding quotation for any SKU in the catalogue.

tools.name: create_offer
tools.description: Create a binding offer / quotation for a quantity of a catalogued product. Returns total price (with volume discount), delivery estimate, payment terms, and a validity window. Call after picking a candidate SKU from the catalogue.

sku.description: Catalogue SKU as shown on the product detail page, e.g. HX-M8-40.

quantity.description: Number of pieces (not packs). Volume tiers: 0-99 list, 100-499 -5%, 500-1999 -10%, 2000+ -15%.

delivery_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code, default DE. Affects shipping rate and delivery estimate.
